chain.thought: Explanation: In 2007, she won 2 awards. In 2008, she won 11 awards (all entries except one nomination). In 2009, she won 7 awards (with one nomination). Therefore, 2008 was her best year in terms of number of awards won.

judge_thought: Explanation: Count the number of awards with result "won" per year. In 2007, there are 2 wins. In 2008, there are 11 wins (all entries except the NME Best Album which is nominated). In 2009, there are 7 wins. Therefore, 2008 has the highest number of awards won.
